name: 17p11_2_FLCN_SD
description: Internal SMS-REP-derived SD around FLCN (Birt-Hogg-Dube gene). FLCN lies within an SD-rich subregion of 17p11.2; intragenic deletions arising from NAHR between FLCN duplicons are recurrent in BHD.

architecture.internal_structure: Two intragenic SD blocks of ~10-20 kb at >98% identity within and 5' of FLCN; mediate recurrent ~30-50 kb intragenic deletions.
